title: Describe view with ref to parent table rowid return INTERNAL Error - Logical column index -1 out of range - DuckDB 1.2.2
description:
### What happens?

After creating a view with a column derived from the rowid pseudocolumn (renamed as table_rowid), the DESCRIBE statement fails to return the expected view information and returns :

> INTERNAL Error: Logical column index -1 out of range

Without reference to rowid it works well.

### To Reproduce

Step to reproduce the error :
```
create table sometable (column1 varchar);
insert into sometable values ('abc');
create view someview as select rowid as table_rowid, * from sometable;
select * from someview;
describe someview;
```
Result
```
v1.2.2 7c039464e4
Enter ".help" for usage hints.
Connected to a transient in-memory database.
Use ".open FILENAME" to reopen on a persistent database.
D create table sometable (column1 varchar);
D insert into sometable values ('abc');
D create view someview as select rowid as table_rowid, * from sometable;
D select * from someview;
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ table_rowid в”Ӯ column1 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    int64    в”Ӯ varchar в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ      0      в”Ӯ abc     в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
D describe someview;
INTERNAL Error:
Logical column index -1 out of range
This error signals an assertion failure within DuckDB. This usually occurs due to unexpected conditions or errors in the program's logic.
For more information, see https://duckdb.org/docs/dev/internal_errors
```
Droping this view and creating it without reference to this rowid works well :
```
D drop view someview;
D create view someview as select * from sometable;
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ column_name в”Ӯ column_type в”Ӯ  null   в”Ӯ   key   в”Ӯ default в”Ӯ  extra  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   varchar   в”Ӯ   varchar   в”Ӯ varchar в”Ӯ varchar в”Ӯ varchar в”Ӯ varchar в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ column1     в”Ӯ VARCHAR     в”Ӯ YES     в”Ӯ NULL    в”Ӯ NULL    в”Ӯ NULL    в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE VIEW test_view AS SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS view_rowid, id, name FROM test_table WHERE id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE FROM USER_TAB_COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'TEST_VIEW';
key_bug_features: DESCRIBE statement fails with view using rowid pseudocolumn
